'''fachoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mear|mear]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mear|mear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fachoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæchereth|fæchereth]] || [[word:fæcherej|fæcherej]] || [[word:fæcheresh|fæcheresh]] || [[word:fæchere|fæchere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fachochoroth|fachochoroth]] || [[word:fachochoroj|fachochoroj]] || [[word:fachochorosh|fachochorosh]] || [[word:fachochoro|fachochoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fachoroth|fachoroth]] || [[word:fachoroj|fachoroj]] || [[word:fachorosh|fachorosh]] || [[word:fachoro|fachoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fachofroth|fachofroth]] || [[word:fachofroj|fachofroj]] || [[word:fachofrosh|fachofrosh]] || [[word:fachofrof|fachofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fachorotho|fachorotho]] || [[word:fachorojo|fachorojo]] || [[word:fachorosho|fachorosho]] || [[word:fachoroko|fachoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fachoroth|fachoroth]] || [[word:fachoroj|fachoroj]] || [[word:fachorosh|fachorosh]] || [[word:fachoro|fachoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fachorothol|fachorothol]] || [[word:fachorojol|fachorojol]] || [[word:fachoroshol|fachoroshol]] || [[word:fachorokol|fachorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fachorothotho|fachorothotho]] || [[word:fachorojojo|fachorojojo]] || [[word:fachoroshosho|fachoroshosho]] || [[word:fachoroko|fachoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fachorothon|fachorothon]] || [[word:fachorojon|fachorojon]] || [[word:fachoroshon|fachoroshon]] || [[word:fachorokon|fachorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fachorothoro|fachorothoro]] || [[word:fachorojoro|fachorojoro]] || [[word:fachoroshoro|fachoroshoro]] || [[word:fachorokoro|fachorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
